creator: john.wolfe@broadcom.com
text:
open-vm-tools 11.3.5 has been released on Sept 23, 2021 containing changes for:

  - A configurable logging capability has been added to the network script.
  - The hgfsmounter (mount.vmhgfs) command has been removed from open-vm-tools.

See: https://github.com/vmware/open-vm-tools/releases/tag/stable-11.3.5

Release Notes are available at: https://github.com/vmware/open-vm-tools/blob/stable-11.3.5/ReleaseNotes.md

The granular changes that have gone into the 11.3.5 release are in the ChangeLog at https://github.com/vmware/open-vm-tools/blob/stable-11.3.5/open-vm-tools/ChangeLog
